headline: Halliburton Charter Vote Tests Governance Control And Valuation Upside
summary: Halliburton is asking shareholders to approve an amendment to the HESI charter that would remove the Pass Through Voting Provision. The proposed change is designed to give Halliburton greater operational flexibility over its key subsidiary’s decisions and transactions. This governance proposal comes alongside recent corporate moves, including the Sekal acquisition, and focuses on internal decision making rather than new deals. For investors tracking NYSE:HAL, this proposal lands while the...

headline: Halliburton Enters Strategic Collaboration Agreement for PETRONAS Suriname Asset Development
summary: HOUSTON, April 06, 2026--Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) has entered into a Strategic Collaboration Agreement with PETRONAS Suriname Exploration & Production BV ("PETRONAS Suriname") and Valaris to support the development of PETRONAS Suriname’s local assets. This effort brings together Halliburton, PETRONAS Suriname, and Valaris early in the development lifecycle to foster close alignment from planning through execution.
